testCases.query: My chain skill asks the user a question and they close the session. When I resume, the state is stale.
expectedBehavior: Updates state.json before every user gate including AskUserQuestion calls
Saves current phase and completed phases to disk before the user interaction pause
Prevents stale state by writing progress immediately before any blocking user prompt
Ensures session closure during a gate does not lose progress from completed phases

testCases.query: My chain ran 4 phases of RCA analysis but then got rate-limited and all the results were lost.
expectedBehavior: Writes a handoff JSON file to .claude/chain/ after every major phase completes
Persists phase results to disk immediately rather than keeping them only in memory
Includes phase number, skill name, and results data in each handoff file
Prevents loss of completed work when rate limits or session compaction interrupts execution

testCases.query: My chain skill crashes when the memory MCP server is not installed. How do I make it resilient?
expectedBehavior: Runs ToolSearch probe before calling any MCP tool to verify availability
Falls back to Grep or other tools when the MCP server is not found or configured
Reads capabilities from .claude/chain/capabilities.json to check available integrations
Never assumes MCP servers exist and always checks before invocation to prevent crashes
